properties.description: Detects anti-debugging techniques and API calls used to evade debugger detection
properties.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where (CommandLine|contains has "IsDebuggerPresent" or CommandLine|contains has "CheckRemoteDebuggerPresent" or CommandLine|contains has "NtQueryInformationProcess" or CommandLine|contains has "OutputDebugString" or CommandLine|contains has "GetTickCount" or CommandLine|contains has "QueryPerformanceCounter" or CommandLine|contains has "timeGetTime" or CommandLine|contains has "SetUnhandledExceptionFilter" or CommandLine|contains has "UnhandledExceptionFilter" or CommandLine|contains has "NtSetInformationThread" or CommandLine|contains has "ThreadHideFromDebugger") and Image endswith "\powershell.exe" and (CommandLine|contains has "Get-Process | Where Name -like "*debug*"" or CommandLine|contains has "Get-WmiObject Win32_Process | Where Name -like "*debug*"" or CommandLine|contains has "Test-Path "*debug*"" or CommandLine|contains has "[Environment]::TickCount" or CommandLine|contains has "Stopwatch") and (CommandLine|contains has "tasklist | findstr debug" or CommandLine|contains has "wmic process get name | findstr debug" or CommandLine|contains has "query process" or CommandLine|contains has "tlist") and (CommandLine|contains has "windbg" or CommandLine|contains has "x64dbg" or CommandLine|contains has "ollydbg" or CommandLine|contains has "ida" or CommandLine|contains has "ghidra" or CommandLine|contains has "cheat engine" or CommandLine|contains has "processhacker" or CommandLine|contains has "process monitor" or CommandLine|contains has "regmon" or CommandLine|contains has "filemon")
